summary: Authentication System testing completed successfully. All 26 backend API tests passed. All 8 frontend auth flow tests passed. Full email/password auth with JWT, 2FA (TOTP), password reset, and email verification working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/refresh - Get new tokens with valid refresh token
GET /api/auth/me - Get current user with valid token
GET /api/auth/me - Reject request with invalid token (401)
POST /api/auth/forgot-password - Request reset for existing user
POST /api/auth/forgot-password - Returns success for nonexistent (prevents enumeration)
POST /api/auth/2fa/enable - Returns TOTP secret and QR code
Full auth flow: register -> login -> get me -> refresh -> logout
Frontend: Homepage loads with Sign In and Get Started buttons
Frontend: Login page with email, password inputs and submit button
Frontend: Register page with name, email, password inputs
Frontend: Registration flow redirects to dashboard on success
Frontend: Navigation shows user dropdown when logged in
Frontend: Logout returns to logged out state
Frontend: Login flow redirects to dashboard on success
Frontend: Forgot password page with email input and submit button
critical_code_review_comments: Auth implementation is complete and well-structured with proper JWT handling
2FA (TOTP) implementation includes QR code generation and backup codes
Password reset flow prevents email enumeration by returning success for all emails
Token refresh properly rotates refresh tokens for security
All auth endpoints have proper data-testid attributes for testing
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_auth_api.py - Created comprehensive auth API tests (26 tests)
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created with TEST_AUTH_ prefix for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth system fully functional. JWT tokens work correctly with 24h access token and 30d refresh token expiry. 2FA enable returns QR code and 8 backup codes. Password reset and email verification tokens are generated but email sending is TODO (logged to console). WebSocket endpoint at /ws/signals/{client_id} requires Pro/Elite tier.

features_verified.registration_api: ✅ POST /api/auth/register - Creates user, returns JWT tokens
features_verified.enable_2fa_api: ✅ POST /api/auth/2fa/enable - Returns secret, QR code, backup codes
features_verified.link_wallet_api: ✅ POST /api/auth/link-wallet - Links Web3 wallet to account
features_verified.frontend_login_page: ✅ Login form with email, password, 2FA support
features_verified.frontend_register_page: ✅ Register form with name, email, password, strength indicator
features_verified.frontend_forgot_password: ✅ Forgot password form with email input
features_verified.frontend_nav_auth_state: ✅ Navigation shows user dropdown when logged in

mocked_apis_list: Email sending for verification and password reset - tokens logged to console instead of sent via email
